title: tithymalus palustris
intro: Tithymalus palustris, also known as marsh euphorbia, is a perennial plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's sap and roots contain medicinal compounds that offer health benefits such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Tithymalus palustris include infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be used topically to treat various health conditions.
